name: Harmonic
description: Company and person data enrichment platform. Enrich startup and professional profiles using LinkedIn URLs or website domains via the Harmonic.ai API.

credential_fields.name: apikey
credential_fields.label: Apikey
credential_fields.description: Harmonic API key (from your Harmonic dashboard)

tools.name: enrich_company_by_linkedin
tools.description: Look up and enrich a company profile using its LinkedIn URL. Returns comprehensive company data including industry, location, funding history, employee count, and technology stack.

linkedin_url.description: The LinkedIn company URL to look up (e.g. 'https://www.linkedin.com/company/stripe/').

tools.name: enrich_company_by_website
tools.description: Look up and enrich a company profile using its website domain. Returns comprehensive company data including industry, location, funding history, employee count, and technology stack.

website_domain.description: The company website domain to look up (e.g. 'stripe.com'). Do not include the protocol (https://).

tools.name: enrich_person_by_linkedin
tools.description: Look up and enrich a person's professional profile using their LinkedIn URL. Returns detailed person data including current and past roles, education, skills, and contact information.

linkedin_url.description: The LinkedIn profile URL to look up (e.g. 'https://www.linkedin.com/in/johndoe/').
